channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: us

item.title: Indiana 3-year-old scratched by monkey inside Walmart
item.description: BEDFORD, Ind. (WXIN) — A 3-year-old is recovering after being scratched this week by a monkey inside a central Indiana Walmart store. The incident reportedly occurred on Wednesday afternoon inside the Walmart Supercenter in Bedford, Indiana. Local police responded to the incident.
item.dc:creator: Joe Schroeder, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: It's more dangerous to drive at night in these states than anywhere else in the US
item.description: Driving at night is dangerous no matter where you are in the U.S. It's harder to see and you're more likely to be sharing the road with fellow drivers who are either tired and could potentially doze off or have had one too many drinks and are driving under the influence.
item.dc:creator: Nick Jachim, Fox 5

item.title: Grandma who texted stranger for Thanksgiving announces breast cancer diagnosis
item.description: The Arizona grandmother who sent a text message to what she believed was her grandson’s phone number, inviting him over for Thanksgiving dinner nearly nine years ago, has announced her diagnosis of breast cancer.
item.dc:creator: Celeste Houmard, WGN 9

item.title: Trump family will get 75% of crypto token revenue
item.description: The Trump family's cryptocurrency platform, World Liberty Financial, indicated in a report released Thursday that DT Marks DEFI LLC, a Delaware-based company connected to the former president, could get 75 percent of WLF's protocol revenues.
item.dc:creator: Juliann Ventura, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Daughter claims mother's body 'misplaced' in Memphis cemetery
item.description: "They have no idea where or how she was lost, but they do not know where she is," says Georleshia Minter.
item.dc:creator: Quametra Wilborn, ABC 4

item.title: Bret Baier says he made 'a mistake' with Trump clip during Harris interview on Fox News
item.description: Fox News anchor Bret Baier said Thursday that he made "a mistake” in not including a specific clip of former President Trump during his interview with Vice President Harris on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Tara Suter, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Texas Supreme Court halts execution of man in shaken baby case after lawmakers' last-minute appeal
item.description: HUNTSVILLE, Texas (AP) — The Texas Supreme Court halted Thursday night’s scheduled execution of a man who would have become the first person in the U.S. put to death for a murder conviction tied to a diagnosis of shaken baby syndrome.
item.dc:creator: JUAN A. LOZANO and MICHAEL GRACZYK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Menendez brothers' uncle requests DA meeting; says boys' motive was greed
item.description: Anderson believes Erik and Lyle Menendez weren't molested by their father Jose and that "justice was served.
item.dc:creator: Liz Jassin, WGN 9

item.title: Daughter claims mother's body 'misplaced' in Tennessee cemetery
item.description: "They have no idea where or how she was lost, but they do not know where she is," says Georleshia Minter.
item.dc:creator: Quametra Wilborn, NewsNation

item.title: Almost 23% of people say politics influences where they live: Poll
item.description: "Some go so far as to consider moving to find that alignment," Danielle Hale, chief economist for Realtor.com, said.
item.dc:creator: Cassie Buchman, KRON4

item.title: Mitzi Gaynor, star of ‘South Pacific,’ dies at 93
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mitzi Gaynor, the effervescent dancer and actor who starred as Nellie Forbush in the 1958 film "South Pacific" and appeared in other musicals with Bing Crosby, Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly, has died. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: KAITLYN HUAMANI and BOB THOMAS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google Flights adds 'Cheapest' option for travelers who just don't care how they get there
item.description: Google Flights has a new option for immediately finding the “cheapest” flight itinerary, but it may come at a slightly different cost.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Florida digs out of mountains of sand swept in by back-to-back hurricanes
item.description: BRADENTON BEACH, Fla. (AP) — When a hurricane sets its sights on Florida, storm-weary residents may think of catastrophic wind, hammering rain and dangerous storm surge. Mounds of sand swallowing their homes? Not so much.
item.dc:creator: KATE PAYNE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: New renderings show how A's ballpark would transform Las Vegas Strip
item.description: Extensive details have been revealed about the proposed $1.5 billion "multi-purpose, enclosed ballpark" on the Las Vegas Strip that could become home to the Las Vegas Athletics MLB franchise in time for the 2028 baseball season.
item.dc:creator: Justin Walker, KTLA 5

item.title: 7-year-old crashes one school bus into another
item.description: She won't be able to drive for another nine years, but the parents of a Missouri second grader say she's already had her first crash. Seven-year-old Alannah Cheffen, of Independence, said she crashed her school bus into another bus on school grounds.
item.dc:creator: Dave D'Marko, KTLA 5

item.title: Liam Payne died from 'multiple traumas,' 'internal and external bleeding,' autopsy reveals
item.description: Officials have released the cause of death of Liam Payne, the former member of the British boy band One Direction, in a preliminary report. According to Argentina's National Criminal and Correctional Prosecutor's Office No.
item.dc:creator: Christine Samra, KTLA 5

item.title: 7-year-old crashes one school bus into another during apparent training
item.description: She won't be able to drive for another nine years but parents of an Independence second grader say she's already had her first crash.
item.dc:creator: Dave D'Marko, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Liam Payne's family releases statement as more details, autopsy results emerge in singer's death
item.description: Payne, 31, died after a fall from the third story of the Casa Sur hotel in Buenos Aires on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Michael Bartiromo, ABC 4

item.title: Mitzi Gaynor, ‘South Pacific’ star, dies at 93
item.description: Mitzi Gaynor, the effervescent dancer and actor who starred as Nellie Forbush in the 1958 film "South Pacific" and appeared in other musicals with Bing Crosby, Frank Sinatra and Gene Kelly, has died. She was 93.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Liam Payne, former One Direction member, dies at 31 in Argentina hotel fall
item.description: BUENOS AIRES, Argentina (AP) — Former One Direction singer Liam Payne, 31, whose chart-topping British boy band generated a global following of swooning fans, was found dead Wednesday after falling from a hotel balcony in Buenos Aires, local officials said.
item.dc:creator: ISABEL DEBRE and KAITLYN HUAMANI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Vance says 'no' when asked if Trump lost in 2020
item.description: The answer was the most specific Vance has been on the subject, and a departure from the series of evasions he has offered about the election Trump continues to say without evidence was decided fraudulently.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Biden administration forgives student loans for 60,000 public service workers
item.description: The Biden administration announced Thursday that it is forgiving the student loans for more than 60,000 public service workers. The move gives $4.5 billion in debt relief to teachers, firefighters and other eligible workers who have been paying on their loans for more than 10 years.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, WGN 9

item.title: 3 dead, several injured after bridge collapses in Mississippi
item.description: Three people have died and several others were injured after a bridge collapsed in Mississippi on Wednesday, according to authorities.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Smith, ABC 4

item.title: Archdiocese of Los Angeles agrees to pay $880 million to victims of clergy sexual abuse
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The Archdiocese of Los Angeles has agreed to pay $880 million to victims of clergy sexual abuse dating back decades, in what an attorney said was the largest single child sex abuse settlement with a Catholic archdiocese, it was announced Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Family of Erik and Lyle Menendez call for their release and say they're victims who were vilified
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Multiple generations of family members of Erik and Lyle Menendez pleaded for the brothers' release from prison on Wednesday, saying they deserve to be free despite life sentences for the 1989 killings of their parents in Beverly Hills because they had been “brutalized” and sexuall
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Navy finds wreckage of fighter jet that crashed during training in Washington state
item.description: The U.S. Navy located the wreckage Wednesday of a fighter jet that crashed in Washington state during a routine training flight in mountainous terrain. The two crew members onboard remain missing.
item.dc:creator: MARTHA BELLISLE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge invalidates election rules passed by Trump-backed board in Georgia
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — A Georgia judge has declared that seven new election rules recently passed by the State Election Board are “illegal, unconstitutional and void.” Fulton County Superior Court Judge Thomas Cox issued the order Wednesday after holding a hearing on challenges to the rules.
item.dc:creator: KATE BRUMBACK, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Google Trends 'Frightgeist' lists the most popular Halloween costumes for 2024
item.description: Whether you are unsure about what your Halloween costume should be or want to stand out from the crowd, Google has you covered.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: After 36 years, accused killer in Oregon cold case to stand trial
item.description: An autopsy revealed Deborah Atrops was physically assaulted and strangled to death. She was 30. Then, the case went cold.
item.dc:creator: Tim Steele, ABC 4

item.title: Witnesses saw an armed group harassing Helene aid workers in a small Tennessee town, sheriff says
item.description: NASHVILLE, Tenn. (AP) — Witnesses reported seeing a group of armed people harassing hurricane relief workers in a remote Tennessee community last weekend, a sheriff said Wednesday as a man in North Carolina appeared in court for allegedly threatening aid workers in that state.
item.dc:creator: KIMBERLEE KRUESI and SARAH BRUMFIELD, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Pro-Israel professor at Columbia barred from campus after harassing and intimidating other employees
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — An outspoken pro-Israel professor at Columbia University has been temporarily barred from campus, a university spokesperson said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: PHILIP MARCELO, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Helene and Milton are both likely to be $50 billion disasters, joining ranks of most costly storms
item.description: Monstrous hurricanes Helene and Milton caused so much complex havoc that damages are still being added up, but government and private experts say they will likely join the infamous ranks of Katrina, Sandy and Harvey as super costly $50-billion-plus killers.
item.dc:creator: SETH BORENSTEIN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Minnesota school district bans officer from teaching after he reenacted George Floyd's murder
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — A Minnesota school district has banned a police officer from working as a substitute teacher after a series of “racially harmful” actions that officials say included putting a student on the ground for a reenactment of the 2020 murder of George Floyd by a Minneapolis officer.
item.dc:creator: BY STEVE KARNOWSKI, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Brightest supermoon rising this week, and it won't be alone
item.description: Get ready to look up for the year’s biggest and brightest supermoon. And it's pairing up with a comet for a rare stargazing two-for-one.
item.dc:creator: Dominique Jack, ABC 4

item.title: Small business disaster loan program is out of money until Congress approves new funds
item.description: House Speaker Mike Johnson assured there would be support to provide necessary funds – when Congress returns after the November election.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricane misinformation stokes fears ahead of election
item.description: The flood of conspiracy theories and rumors following the severe weather in the South is sparking concerns that political figures’ embrace of misinformation is just the beginning as the general election draws closer.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Armed man arrested near Trump rally denies 'assassination attempt' claims
item.description: “I’m an artist, I’m the last person that would cause any violence and harm to anybody,” the man has since said.
item.dc:creator: Josh DuBose, WFLA, NBC
